review_title: It really takes zero effort to build a website
description: I just happen to have a new personal website. As 90% of people will check my website on their mobile, I feel proud of the result. It is nice looking and easy to navigate and so it makes my desktop version of my website looks simple and easy too. Kleap websites first appeared to me too simple but today... non Kleap websites look old fashion: it's been a few months I start to look at ancient websites ( all the current ones ) like old unnecessary complexfull and useless stuff. Its my autoproof I feel Kleap will make a difference
author: Adrien T.
pros: Its the fact that the software is mobile first oriented. Web building has always made nodes in my brain that most of time made me lost my time for very often bring me back to google search trying to discover a new "web builder". With Kleap, for the first time I have a proper tool that allows me to focus on my content knowing that I will quickly get a good looking result... and all happens on my mobile phone. Highly practical to be able to manage my website everywhere the same way I update my instagram or twitter
cons: Its lacking functionalities compared to wordpress or other more complex web builders, as a designer I'd like to be able to change more stuff but still, it makes the builder clear and efficient. A bad point for now which will be fixed in the futur is that there is yet no e-commerce
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I build a new website for my startup in 5min. I created landing pages and it increases the conversion for the mobile users. It's really easy compared to WordPress or other web builders.
cons: As it's young it lacks some functionalities to customize the design but the team responds quickly and they have a feature voting system.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
